description: Style NoteMulti purpose bags with oodles of style and tons of detailing mark baggit out - and they also succeed in keeping the designs understated and charming. Easily to pair up with whatever you're wearing to complement any outfit. Go ahead and grab your favourite from Baggit's classy range of bags. Product DetailsPrinted blue and grey bag with branding on the baseTwo short handles with a leatherette overlay at the centre for better gripOne main compartment with drawstring ties that can be adjusted from either sideMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 18 cmWidth: 26 cmDepth: 16 cm
